Response 220982805

ASU’s Collaboration with Applied Materials Expanded Significantly This Year, with Research Funding

Community Engagement (CE) - source indicates reciprocal or jointly beneficial collaboration.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

ASU’s collaboration with Applied Materials expanded significantly this year, with research funding surpassing $10 million. This investment supported more than 40 workshops, generated over 50 research proposals, and resulted in 45 approved projects involving more than 50 graduate students across m...
